component_identification.content: Pond tile, hex garden plot tiles in three colors, irrigation channels, bamboo section pieces by color, gardener miniature, panda miniature, weather die, objective cards (plot, gardener, panda), and improvement tokens. Players manipulate the garden while balancing growth and panda appetite.

core_game_loop.content: Each turn: optionally apply weather, then take two different actions (or same action twice with certain weather). Actions include placing a tile, adding irrigation, moving gardener, moving panda, or drawing objective cards. Completing objectives earns points and ends when a set number are achieved.

detailed_rules.content: All plots must connect to the existing garden from the central pond. Irrigation is required for bamboo growth unless a plot is adjacent to the pond or has water-retention improvement. Gardener movement in straight lines grows bamboo on entered plot and neighboring matching-color irrigated plots, respecting height limits. Panda movement in straight lines eats one bamboo section from the destination plot, which can satisfy panda objectives requiring collected colors. Plot objectives care about final board patterns and sometimes required improvements. Weather die faces can grant extra action, move either character freely, gain irrigation, or protect bamboo from panda via clouds/improvements. Players may hold limited objective cards of each type; completed cards are revealed for points.

scoring_and_endgame.content: When a player completes the required number of objectives (varies by player count), finish the round so all players have equal turns. Then add points from completed objectives, plus any endgame bonus specified by rules for first trigger player. Highest score wins.

beginner_strategy.content: Keep options open by holding mixed objective types; don’t tunnel one category too early. Build irrigation infrastructure early so growth actions stay efficient. Move panda intentionally to both score and deny opponents’ gardener plans. Watch board pattern objectives others might be racing toward and disrupt with tile placement. Use weather bonuses to chain high-value turns, especially extra action plus a scoring reveal.
